query:
-- Check tasks assigned to duplicate user IDs
SELECT 'tasks' as tbl, assignedToId as userId, COUNT(*) as refs FROM tasks WHERE assignedToId IN (750180,750184,750188,750205) GROUP BY assignedToId
UNION ALL
SELECT 'tasks_created', createdById, COUNT(*) FROM tasks WHERE createdById IN (750180,750184,750188,750205) GROUP BY createdById
UNION ALL
SELECT 'agent_connections', agentId, COUNT(*) FROM agent_connections WHERE agentId IN (750180,750184,750188,750205) GROUP BY agentId
UNION ALL
SELECT 'transactions', agentId, COUNT(*) FROM transactions WHERE agentId IN (750180,750184,750188,750205) GROUP BY agentId
UNION ALL
SELECT 'contacts_isa', assignedIsaId, COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE assignedIsaId IN (750180,750184,750188,750205) GROUP BY assignedIsaId
UNION ALL
SELECT 'groups_leader', leaderId, COUNT(*) FROM groups WHERE leaderId IN (750180,750184,750188,750205) GROUP BY leaderId
UNION ALL
SELECT 'group_members', userId, COUNT(*) FROM group_members WHERE userId IN (750180,750184,750188,750205) GROUP BY userId;
